name: Peanut Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
LAYER #1: Blend flour and butter using a pastry cutter or knives. Add the chopped peanuts. Press evenly into a 9" x 13" pan. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Cool completely.
LAYER #2: Cream together peanut butter and cream cheese. Add powdered sugar and mix well. Blend in the thawed Cool Whip. Spread over the cooled layer #1.
LAYER #3: In a large bowl, mix the vanilla and chocolate instant puddings with milk. Spread over Layer #2.
LAYER #4: Spread the remaining Cool Whip over Layer #3. Freeze Hershey bars, break into small pieces, and sprinkle over the whipped topping. Sprinkle 1/3 cup chopped peanuts over the Hershey bar. Chill for 3 hours or longer.
